title: mentha longifolia var. leioneura
intro: Mentha longifolia var. leioneura, commonly known as Hoary Peppermint, is a variety of the peppermint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Hoary Peppermint include its ability to ease nausea, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. Hoary Peppermint can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
